activities_projects.title: Drawing a Circle
activities_projects.objective: Learn to draw circles with given radius
steps: Use compass to draw a circle with radius 3 cm
Label the center as O
Draw a few radii and mark points on the circumference

activities_projects.title: Identifying Chords
activities_projects.objective: Learn what chords are in a circle
steps: Draw a circle
Draw two different chords
Label endpoints of chords

activities_projects.title: Drawing Diameter
activities_projects.objective: Understand diameter as a special chord
steps: Draw a circle with center O
Draw a chord passing through O
Label it as diameter

activities_projects.title: Drawing Tangents
activities_projects.objective: Learn to draw tangent at a point on a circle
steps: Draw a circle with center O
Mark a point on the circumference
Draw a tangent at that point using ruler

activities_projects.title: Radius and Diameter Relationship
steps: Draw a circle
Measure radius and diameter
Verify that diameter = 2 × radius
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Recognises relationship between radius and diameter

activities_projects.title: Identifying Circumference Points
activities_projects.objective: Learn what points lie on the circumference
steps: Draw a circle with center O
Mark 5 points on the circumference
Connect points to form chords
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct points and chords drawn (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Observing Arcs
steps: Draw a circle and a chord AB
Label the two arcs formed as major and minor
Write observations

activities_projects.title: Identifying Sector and Segment
activities_projects.objective: Understand sectors and segments of a circle
steps: Draw a circle and chord AB
Shade the segment and sector formed
Label them properly

activities_projects.title: Drawing Concentric Circles
activities_projects.objective: Understand concentric circles and their properties
steps: Draw a circle with center O
Draw another circle with same center but different radius
Observe and note that centers are same

activities_projects.title: Circle in Daily Life
steps: Look for circular objects around home or school
Draw at least three examples
Label radius, diameter, and center
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Connects circle concepts to real life
